title: Slide Preparation for Mounting Samples for TissueCyte 1000 Sectioning and Imaging
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"29qo5","text":"This protocol describes the preparation of 1x3 glass slides for mounting embedded mouse brain samples for subsequent imaging and sectioning on TissueCyte 1000.
